page.title: Inventory
page.permissionNote: Only administrators and managers can record entries or adjust stock. Inventory views remain available.
page.stockNote: The totals on this screen still show the tenant aggregate, but they now stay synchronized with the sum of site balances. Adjustments, entries, and transfers update both surfaces in lockstep.

balances.noSites: No active sites yet. Create one to start tracking per-site stock.
balances.projectionNote: Phase 2 steps 3-4: site balances are authoritative. Transfers can remain in transit, and aggregate product stock stays synchronized with the sum of site balances.
balances.transferRequiresTwoSites: At least two active sites are required to transfer stock.

transferHistory.title: Transfer history
transferHistory.description: Recent stock transfers between sites. You can receive in-transit shipments or void movements to reverse balances.
transferHistory.confirmVoidMessage: This will move {{quantity}} units back from {{to}} to {{from}}. Balances will update immediately.
transferHistory.confirmVoidGeneric: This will reverse the transfer and restore the original balances.

transferReceive.title: Receive transfer
transferReceive.description: Record the actual received quantities. Each line defaults to the shipped amount — lower any line if units are missing.
transferReceive.discrepancyHelp: Recorded alongside the receipt when any line has a variance.
transferReceive.discrepancyPlaceholder: Optional — explain the cause (e.g., box arrived damaged, 3 units missing).

summary.shortage: Shortage of {{amount}} units detected across {{count}} lines.
summary.match: Received quantities match what was shipped.

errors.exceedsShipped: Received quantity cannot be greater than the shipped quantity.

transferModal.title: Transfer stock between sites
transferModal.noStockAtSource: No products with on-hand stock at the selected origin site.
transferModal.deferHelp: Origin is debited immediately. Destination is credited when the shipment arrives and you click Receive.
transferModal.serialsHelp: Select the exact physical units that will move to the destination site.
transferModal.noSerials: No sellable serial units are available at this site.

errors.sitesRequired: Please select both origin and destination sites.
errors.sitesIdentical: Origin and destination sites must be different.
errors.productRequired: Please select a product to transfer.
errors.quantityInvalid: Quantity must be greater than zero.
errors.quantityExceedsOnHand: Quantity exceeds the on-hand stock at the origin ({{available}}).

adjustment.title: Adjust {{name}}
adjustment.noProduct: Select a product before adjusting stock.
adjustment.siteScope: This adjustment updates the active site balance: {{site}}.
adjustment.lotTrackedHelp: This product tracks lots. Receive a named lot instead of editing aggregate stock.
adjustment.serialTrackedHelp: This product tracks serial numbers. Receive or sell exact units instead of editing aggregate stock.
adjustment.stockMin: Stock must be zero or greater

entry.noSelection: Select a product before recording inventory.
entry.lotModeHelp: This product tracks lots. The receipt updates the named batch and the active site's stock atomically.
entry.serialModeHelp: Enter one serial number per physical unit. The receipt adds the exact units and active-site stock atomically.
entry.serialNumbersPlaceholder:
One serial per line
SN-0001
SN-0002
entry.serialNumbersRequired: Enter at least one serial number
entry.serialNumbersDuplicate: Remove duplicate serial numbers before saving
entry.serialSiteRequired: Select an active site before receiving serial units.
entry.lotSiteRequired: Select an active site before receiving this lot.
entry.siteScope: This entry updates the active site balance: {{site}}.
entry.quantityMin: Quantity must be greater than zero
entry.costMin: Cost must be zero or greater

serialLookup.title: Warranty lookup
serialLookup.description: Find the current unit, latest sale, customer, and warranty date by exact serial number.
serialLookup.notFound: No unit was found with serial {{serial}}.

purchases.hint: Return only the quantities that are physically leaving stock back to the provider.
purchases.returnQtyMax: Only {{count}} units remain available to return
purchases.minItems: Select at least one line quantity to return
purchases.returnSerialsHelp: Select the exact physical units leaving for the supplier.
purchases.noReturnableSerials: No serial units from this purchase are currently available at the receiving site.

orders.hint: Receive only the quantities that physically entered stock in this delivery.
orders.receiptNotesPlaceholder: Optional note about this delivery batch
orders.minItems: Select at least one line quantity to receive
orders.serialNumbersDuplicate: Remove duplicate serial numbers before receiving

expiry.emptyDescription: No lots with stock expire within the next {{days}} days.

toast.suggestedDescription: A {{pct}}% discount for {{product}} is now visible at the register.
toast.errorTitle: The suggestion could not be saved
